name: Voice of Command
community_notes: Models 3 offensive Orders as a choice: Take Aim (+1 BS), First Rank Fire (+1A on Rapid Fire), Move Move Move (+3M). Hill-climbing selects Take Aim (+1 hit) as universally best. Fix Bayonets (+1 WS) omitted as it's equivalent to Take Aim for melee phase.
